title: Golden Dandelion Advancement
description: This Datapack and Mod adds a new advancement for obtaining a Golden Dandelion, translated into multiple languages (+20), compatible with version 26.1
body:
# Golden Dandelion Advancement

**This DataPack and Mod** adds new advancement for obtaining a Golden Dandelion, translated into multiple languages, compatible with version 26.1

![Golden Dandelion Advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0008a5731f1dcf8c635f222ab7c0d4a8cefc5030.png)
> **Advancement Labs © - 2026**

## Notas📝 (Notes)
- **Golden Dandelion Advancement** is **compatible** with versions **26.1**🏷️
- **Golden Dandelion Advancement** is compatible with any **functions and advancements Datapack in the World**
- **Golden Dandelion Advancement** it has been translated into more than **20 Languages**
- **No** it is necessary to **unzip** the downloaded file 🗂️
